'''fatuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jockteleg|jockteleg]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jockteleg|jockteleg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fatuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætivith|fætivith]] || [[word:fætivij|fætivij]] || [[word:fætivish|fætivish]] || [[word:fætivi|fætivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatutuvuth|fatutuvuth]] || [[word:fatutuvuj|fatutuvuj]] || [[word:fatutuvush|fatutuvush]] || [[word:fatutuvu|fatutuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatuvuth|fatuvuth]] || [[word:fatuvuj|fatuvuj]] || [[word:fatuvush|fatuvush]] || [[word:fatuvu|fatuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fatufvuth|fatufvuth]] || [[word:fatufvuj|fatufvuj]] || [[word:fatufvush|fatufvush]] || [[word:fatufvuf|fatufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatuvuthu|fatuvuthu]] || [[word:fatuvuju|fatuvuju]] || [[word:fatuvushu|fatuvushu]] || [[word:fatuvuku|fatuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatuvuth|fatuvuth]] || [[word:fatuvuj|fatuvuj]] || [[word:fatuvush|fatuvush]] || [[word:fatuvu|fatuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatuvuthul|fatuvuthul]] || [[word:fatuvujul|fatuvujul]] || [[word:fatuvushul|fatuvushul]] || [[word:fatuvukul|fatuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatuvuthuthu|fatuvuthuthu]] || [[word:fatuvujuju|fatuvujuju]] || [[word:fatuvushushu|fatuvushushu]] || [[word:fatuvuku|fatuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatuvuthun|fatuvuthun]] || [[word:fatuvujun|fatuvujun]] || [[word:fatuvushun|fatuvushun]] || [[word:fatuvukun|fatuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatuvuthuoro|fatuvuthuoro]] || [[word:fatuvujuoro|fatuvujuoro]] || [[word:fatuvushuoro|fatuvushuoro]] || [[word:fatuvukuoro|fatuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
